bracu_official.summary: The schedule for the Undergraduate "Wishlist" event for Fall 2026 has been officially announced.

bracu_official.summary: The final examinations are scheduled to take place on December 10th.

bracu_official.summary: The final examinations are scheduled to take place on September 12th.

bracu_official.title: Eid-e-Miladun Nabi - University closed
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University will be closed on August 26th in observance of Eid-e-Miladun Nabi.

bracu_official.title: July Mass Uprising Day
bracu_official.summary: August 5th is observed as July Mass Uprising Day within the academic calendar.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University conducts workshop on educational innovation through action research
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted a workshop on educational innovation, focusing on action research methodologies, on July 13, 2026.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University crowned champion at EWU Robotfest 2026 for innovative quadruped robot
bracu_official.summary: On July 12, 2026, BRAC University won the EWU Robotfest 2026 championship with its innovative quadruped robot.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University seminar raises awareness on cervical cancer
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University organized a seminar on July 9, 2026, to raise awareness among the community about cervical cancer.
